subtitle: DevOps Mastery
description: Master DevOps from fundamentals to advanced. Learn Linux, CI/CD, Docker, Kubernetes, Terraform, Ansible, and monitoring tools for cloud-native infrastructure.

challenges.title: DevOps Fundamentals & Linux Basics
challenges.description: DevOps culture, CI/CD concepts, operating system fundamentals, Linux file system, kernel, and basic administration

challenges.title: Linux Administration & Shell Scripting
challenges.description: Linux CLI, package managers, user management, file permissions, shell scripting basics, variables, and environment variables
